title: crataegus oxyacantha var. pentagyna
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. pentagyna, also known as the hawthorn pentagynous, is a variety of the hawthorn tree, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in supporting heart health, and has been traditionally used to treat cardiovascular issues such as high blood pressure, chest pain, and coronary artery disease. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. pentagyna include its ability to improve circulation, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce the risk of heart failure, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
